message:
test(security): add regression tests for request parsing hardening (bd-uz2s)

- smuggling_unknown_http_version_rejected: verify unknown HTTP versions
  are rejected (not defaulted to HTTP/1.1)
- smuggling_request_line_extra_parts_rejected: verify extra parts in
  request line cause rejection
- traversal_overlong_utf8_percent_decoded: verify overlong UTF-8
  sequences in percent-decoded paths are rejected
- smuggling_compound_transfer_encoding_rejected: verify compound TE
  like "gzip, chunked" is rejected

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
